playbook.intent: MVP that works on localhost → MVP that survives paying customers without a co-founder/SRE.
playbook.scope: Solo founder takes an MVP that works on localhost and makes it survive paying customers without a co-founder or SRE. End state: Stripe live, RLS audited, backups proven, legal docs live, support inbox routed. Exit artifact is a hardening checklist with every row checked or explicitly accepted-risk.

success-criteria.criterion: Stripe live mode tested with real $1 charge + refund
Row-level security (or equivalent) audited per table
Secrets management: no secrets in git, vault in use
Backups: restore drill performed once before launch
Legal docs live: ToS, Privacy, Refund
Support inbox routed + first-reply SLA documented

stage.name: Security audit
stage.intent: Catch the vibe-coded security debt before paying customers do.

tasks.task: Scan git history for secret leaks

stage.decision-gate: Advance when zero P0/P1 findings open. Refuse launch with any open P0.

stage.name: Payments hardening
stage.intent: Stripe live + webhooks + refund flow tested.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when $1 charge + refund cycle works clean. Stay if webhooks miss events.

stage.name: Backups
stage.intent: Prove restore, don't just enable backups.

tasks.task: Run a restore drill on staging

stage.decision-gate: Advance when restore completed successfully. Refuse launch without proven restore.

stage.name: Legal
stage.intent: ToS / Privacy / Refund live and linked from footer.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when all 3 are live. Stay if any missing.

stage.name: Support
stage.intent: Inbox routed. Customer can reach you.
stage.decision-gate: Required output: live inbox + documented SLA. No invisible founders post-launch.

extra.value: [SOC2 / ISO compliance — overkill at pre-launch, Multi-region failover — single-region only]
[MVP works end-to-end on localhost, Stripe test mode integrated]
[Going live with backups enabled but never restored — discovering it doesn't work mid-incident, Skipping legal docs because 'just MVP' — refund disputes get expensive fast]
['Could I restore prod tonight from yesterday''s backup without panic?', 'Did the $1 charge + refund cycle actually settle, or just look successful in the UI?']
{human: faion get-content pre-launch-hardening-mvp --format md, agent: faion get-content pre-launch-hardening-mvp --format context, json: faion get-content pre-launch-hardening-mvp --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
